title: cronos bridge - Open App
meta_description: cronos bridge opens the official Cronos EVM Bridge app for CRO and supported IBC transfers to Cronos networks.
hero_h2: Move CRO and supported IBC assets into Cronos EVM
hero_lead: cronos bridge directs users to the official Cronos EVM Bridge web app for IBC transfers between Cronos POS, Cronos EVM, and supported Cosmos networks.
what_is: Cronos Bridge is the official Cronos EVM Bridge web app for moving supported assets between Cronos POS, Cronos EVM, and selected Cosmos IBC networks; Cronos docs describe it as a decentralized protocol built on open-source IBC infrastructure.

how.d: Open the official app, connect a supported wallet, and approve the prompt in the wallet interface.
Select the origin network, destination network, and asset; verify the active wallet network and recipient address.
Review the amount, displayed network fees, and destination details before continuing.
Sign the wallet request, then track the bridge status in the app history or linked explorer view.

points.p: Use the official web app and verify the cronos.org domain before connecting a wallet.
The app focuses on Cronos POS, Cronos EVM, and supported Cosmos IBC network transfers rather than generic exchange deposits.
When transaction links are available, review activity with the Cronos Explorer.

faq.q: What is cronos bridge used for?
faq.a: It is used to move supported assets between Cronos POS, Cronos EVM, and selected Cosmos IBC networks through the official Cronos web app.

faq.q: Is cronos bridge the official app?
faq.a: The official route listed by Cronos documentation is https://cronos.org/bridge; always verify the domain before connecting a wallet.

faq.q: Which wallets work with cronos bridge?
faq.a: Cronos documentation references support for wallet flows including MetaMask, Keplr, Crypto.com Onchain Wallet, and Rabby, depending on route and environment.
The official FAQ says the bridge service itself does not add a service fee, but network gas fees still apply.

faq.q: How long does cronos bridge take?
faq.a: Cronos states that IBC transfers can take from about 1 minute to 1 hour depending on congestion, with unresolved transfers expected to complete or revert.

footer_note: Not the official app. Verify cronos.org before connecting a wallet. Educational content only; not financial advice.
